---
name: Licensing inquiry
about: I want to use Aegis in production / commercially
title: "[license] "
labels: licensing
---

> The fastest path for licensing is the email contact in
> [COMMERCIAL.md](../blob/main/COMMERCIAL.md). Opening an issue is fine
> too if you'd prefer that — but don't include sensitive deal info
> publicly. Use email for anything you wouldn't want indexed by Google.

**Who you are**
Organization, role, and who you'd be deploying to.

**Intended use case**
- [ ] Internal analyst tool (hedge fund, bank, law firm, etc.)
- [ ] Embedded in a product/service we sell
- [ ] SaaS / hosted offering
- [ ] Part of a consulting engagement
- [ ] Academic research (note: free under the LICENSE Research exception)
- [ ] Other (describe)

**Scope**
- Approximate number of seats:
- Approximate number of companies covered:
- Geographies:
- Data sources you'd want to integrate (EDGAR / Bloomberg / ISS / other):

**Timeline**
- Evaluating now / piloting / production within 3 months / 6+ months

**Anything else worth knowing**
